diagrams.title: Friend Class Declaration Syntax
diagrams.description: Shows the syntax and placement of friend class declaration in a C++ class
elements: friend class B; in private section
Arrow showing B accessing A's private members
diagrams.purpose: Understanding basic syntax and declaration of friend classes

diagrams.title: One-Way Nature of Friendship
diagrams.description: Demonstrates that friendship is not mutual - only one class grants access
elements: X mark on arrow B→A labeled 'not friend'
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing that friendship grants access in one direction only

diagrams.title: Friendship - Not Inherited
diagrams.description: Shows that derived classes of friend do not inherit friendship
elements: X marks showing DerivedB cannot access A's private members
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that friendship is not inherited by derived classes

diagrams.title: Friendship - Not Transitive
diagrams.description: Demonstrates that friend of friend is not automatically a friend
elements: X mark between A and C showing not transitive
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing that friendship doesn't chain between multiple classes
